name: GOLFTEC Virginia Beach
address: 4540 Princess Anne Rd Suite 106, Virginia Beach, VA 23462
about: GOLFTEC Virginia Beach is a high-tech golf training facility that provides data-driven instruction using advanced motion measurement technology and high-speed video analysis. The studio is part of a national chain focused on personalized golf improvement through certified coaching and technology like OPTIMOTION and launch monitors. Services include private lessons, club fittings, and practice memberships designed for golfers of all skill levels, from beginners to low-handicap players seeking to refine their game.
why_golfers_like_it: Personalized game plans based on swing data and video analysis
Advanced technology like OPTIMOTION and launch monitors for precise feedback
PGA-certified coaches with data-driven teaching methods
Pro shop discount for golf gear and equipment
Structured improvement programs with measurable results

simulator_hardware.notes: Launch monitor mentioned in club fitting services

faq.question: Do I need to bring my own clubs?
faq.answer: Club rentals are available at the pro shop, and you can also bring your own clubs for lessons or practice sessions.

faq.question: Can I bring food or drinks?
faq.answer: No food or drink service is mentioned, though BYOB policies are not specified.

faq.question: How long does it take to play 18 holes?
faq.answer: Indoor simulator sessions are not detailed, but typical golf simulator rounds take 1-2 hours depending on the format.

faq.question: Is this venue kid-friendly?
faq.answer: Yes, the facility offers junior programs and is designed for golfers of all ages and skill levels, including youth players.
